steps.name: Spot/Center Drilling
steps.purpose: Locate center position and create entry chamfer to prevent drill walk.
steps.parameter_rules: Cutting Speed is 50% of twist drill; Feed per revolution is 0.002 inch.

steps.name: Twist Drilling
steps.purpose: Drill through or blind hole to major pre-sizing diameter.
steps.parameter_rules: Cutting Speed matches material SFM; Feed matches drill diameter.

steps.name: Countersink / Deburr
steps.purpose: Deburr hole entrance and apply chamfer.
steps.parameter_rules: Low RPM (approx 100-300 RPM); Feed manually controlled or 0.001 ipr.
